extract_use_case_prompt:
You are an information extraction system specialized in software requirements.

Task:
Extract ONE concise use-case sentence from the system description.

Strict Rules:
- Return ONLY one sentence.
- Use active voice.
- Preserve the original meaning.
- Do NOT invent details.
- Do NOT explain.
- Do NOT add comments or formatting.
- Focus only on the system's primary functionality.

<SystemDescription>
{text}
</SystemDescription>

Use Case:
